managedScripts.title: Managed userscripts
managedScripts.description: Userscripts provisioned by enterprise policy. Each item may provide a remote userscript URL or inline userscript source.

url.title: Userscript URL
url.description: HTTPS or HTTP userscript URL fetched through ScriptVault's normal install guards.

code.title: Inline userscript source
code.description: Complete userscript source including a ==UserScript== metadata block.

managedScriptsCleanup.title: Prune removed managed scripts
managedScriptsCleanup.description: When true, ScriptVault removes locally stored managed scripts that are no longer present in managedScripts.
